name: 300W Power Supply / Adapter – 12V/24V – IP67 Rated
description: High-capacity 300W max output: Suitable for a range of powerful and energy-efficient lighting applications Versatile voltage options: Choose from 12V or 24V output depending on your project requirements IP67 waterproof rating: Ensures protection and reliable performance even in harsh weather conditions Perfect for LED strip lighting: Enhance ambiance in residential and commercial spaces, including deck and patio lighting, under-cabinet lighting, and architectural features Ideal for rope light applications: Illuminate walkways, driveways, landscaping, and outdoor living areas with energy-saving and long-lasting illumination Compatible with LED modules: Excellent choice for signage lighting, architectural lighting, display cases, and more Benefit-oriented and quality-driven: This outdoor power supply is designed to make your lighting projects easier, more efficient, and cost-effective while providing long-lasting performance and reliability for various applications.
short_desc: Specifications: Output Wattage: Max 300W Output Voltage: 12VDC / 24VDC Output Current: Max 25A at 12V Max 12.5A at 24V Input Voltage: 100–277VAC Input Current: 2.58–4.53A Certifications: UL Listed, IP65 Class Type: Type P Dimensions: 282 × 86 × 23.5 mm Lifespan: 50,000 hours Use: LED Modules, Strip Lights, Low Voltage Lights, etc.
